desc_original: Thai tourism should brace for an influx of foreigners seeking a safe haven amid growing geopolitical conflict, similar to the surge experienced during the Russia-Ukraine War a few years ago, when Russian arrivals rose to 1.74 million in 2024, significantly impacting property markets in tourism cities.
summary_cn: 随着中东地缘政治冲突加剧，泰国旅游业预计将迎来大量寻求避风港的外国人，类似于俄乌战争期间的涌入。2024年俄罗斯入境人数曾飙升至174万，对旅游城市的房地产市场产生重大影响。目前泰国被视为区域避风港，预计将再次吸引避险人群。这对关注泰国房产和长期居留政策的投资者是重要信号。
title_cn: 旅游业严阵以待：中东冲突或引发赴泰“避难”潮 (Tourism braces for impact of Mideast war)

desc_original: Thai energy authorities are preparing to secure loans from commercial banks to shore up the Oil Fuel Fund, which is rapidly running dry as global crude prices surge past US$100 per barrel amid the escalating US-Iran conflict.
summary_cn: 受美伊冲突升级影响，全球原油价格已突破每桶100美元。泰国燃油基金正迅速耗尽，能源部门计划向商业银行贷款以填补缺口并维持燃油价格补贴。内阁预计周二批准短期和中期能源管理措施。油价上涨将直接推高泰国国内通胀和生活成本，是目前宏观经济的核心变量。
title_cn: 油价突破100美元：泰国动用贷款维持燃油基金 (State steps in as oil rockets to $100)

title: Govt moves to curb fuel prices
title_cn: 政府采取措施抑制燃油价格
desc_original: The cabinet is expected to approve a series of short- and medium-term energy management measures on Tuesday to cope with surging global energy prices driven by the conflict in the Middle East.
summary_cn: 内阁预计将于周二批准一系列短期和中长期能源管理措施，以应对中东冲突导致的全球能源价格上涨。

title: Thai Regulator Eases Rules for Evacuation Flights
title_cn: 泰国监管机构放松撤离航班规定
desc_original: BANGKOK — 9 March 2026, Thailand's civil aviation regulator has eased rules to allow additional evacuation flights amid conflict in the Middle East, prioritising humanitarian needs for passengers stranded abroad. Air Chief Marshal Manat Chavanaprayoon, director of the Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT), said on Monday that under normal circumstances flight approvals must follow each country's standard procedures. However, during war or emergencies, authorities often need greater flexibility and cooperation, particularly for flights arranged to repatriate citizens or passengers back to
summary_cn: 泰国航空监管机构放宽规定，允许在中东冲突期间增加撤离航班，优先考虑被困海外乘客的人道主义需求。CAAT 表示将提供更大灵活性。

title: First group of 62 Thai nationals arrives safely in Turkey from Iran
title_cn: 首批62名泰国公民经土耳其安全撤离
desc_original: First group of 62 Thai nationals arrives safely in Turkey from Iran Legacy A group of 62 Thai nationals has crossed from Iran into Turkey as part of a Royal Thai Government evacuation effort linked to an ongoing conflict in the Middle East, with onward travel to Thailand planned over March 8 and today, March 9. Officials at the Kapıköy border checkpoint received the first group on the evening of March 7 at 6.40pm local time. The reception was coordinated with the Department of Consular Affairs and representatives from the Royal Thai Embassy in Ankara. Photo via MFA Border staff at Kapıköy faci
summary_cn: 作为泰国政府撤离行动的一部分，62名泰国公民从伊朗进入土耳其，计划于3月8-9日返回泰国。

title: Bangkok Set to Welcome the World as Thailand Counts Down to 2026 IMF-World Bank Annual Meetings
title_cn: 曼谷将主办2026年IMF-世界银行年会
desc_original: The meetings are due to take place from 12 to 18 October 2026 at the Queen Sirikit National Convention Centre (QSNCC) in Bangkok.
summary_cn: 会议将于2026年10月12日至18日在曼谷诗丽吉国家会议中心（QSNCC）举行，这是泰国自1991年以来再次主办该盛会。
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban

desc_original: The Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET) has expressed confidence that foreign investors will return to Thai equities once geopolitical tensions subside, noting that Thailand could serve as a regional safe haven and that the bourse has robust mechanisms to manage volatility during periods of crisis.
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易所（SET）表示，一旦地缘政治紧张局势缓解，外资将重返泰国股市。SET认为泰国具有区域避风港潜力，且交易所拥有健全的机制来管理危机期间的波动。在当前全球股市动荡背景下，SET试图稳固投资者信心，强调泰国的避险价值。
title_cn: 交易所看好外资归来：泰国股市被视为避风港 (Thai bourse buoyant on return of foreign investors)

desc_original: Two arrested after luxury watches stolen in Pattaya home break-in. 26 year old Kritsaphong and 28 year old Nakarin, were linked to a burglary at a luxury home in the Phra Tamnak area, where two intruders allegedly climbed a wall to enter the property. Luxury watches worth more than 6.4 million baht reported stolen.
summary_cn: 芭提雅警方逮捕了两名涉嫌在帕塔纳克山（Phra Tamnak）豪宅区行窃的男青年。嫌犯翻墙进入屋内，盗走价值超过640万泰铢的多块名表。此事件提醒在芭提雅居住的外国人，高净值社区的安保和财产保险仍需重视。目前嫌犯已被拘留并接受进一步调查。
title_cn: 芭提雅帕塔纳克山豪宅窃案告破：名表价值640万铢 (Two arrested after luxury watches stolen in Pattaya home break-in)

title: Restaurants call for anti-inflation support
title_cn: 泰国餐饮协会呼吁政府提供抗通胀支持
desc_original: The Thai Restaurant Association is calling on the government to support the restaurant industry amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.
summary_cn: 泰国餐饮协会呼吁政府在中东冲突持续的情况下支持餐饮行业。该组织表示，通胀压力和能源成本上涨正在严重冲击餐饮企业生存。

title: ThaiHealth inspects pollution-hit village
title_cn: ThaiHealth  inspects 污染受损村庄
desc_original: CHIANG RAI: A team from the Thai Health Promotion Foundation (ThaiHealth) inspected a riverside community on Sunday, amid growing concerns about heavy metal contamination along the Kok River.
summary_cn: 泰国健康促进基金会团队周日视察了清莱府 Kok 河沿岸一个社区，此前人们对河段重金属污染的担忧日益加剧。

title: PP defiant despite  legal threat to MPs
title_cn: 人民党领袖无视法律威胁，坚持履行反对党领袖职责
desc_original: Natthaphong Ruengpanyawut, leader of the People's Party, has pledged to perform his duties as opposition leader vigorously despite a looming legal case involving 44 MPs from his party.
summary_cn: 人民党领袖 Natthaphong Ruengpanyawut 表示，尽管面临涉及该党44名议员的法律案件，他仍将坚定履行反对党领袖职责。

title: CIB finds 124,200 gecko carcasses at Pathum Thani warehouse
title_cn: 中央调查局在北革府仓库查获12万条壁虎尸体
desc_original: CIB finds 124,200 gecko carcasses at Pathum Thani warehouse Legacy The Central Investigation Bureau (CIB) yesterday, March 8, searched a warehouse in Lam Luk Ka district, Pathum Thani , leading to the arrest of two suspects and the seizure of dried gecko carcasses and restricted wood. The CIB's Natural Resources and Environmental Crime Suppression Division said investigators had developed information that the site was being used to hide wildlife carcasses and protected wood, with possible links to an international smuggling network. Photo via Naewna Officers gathered evidence and obtained a se
summary_cn: 中央调查局（CIB）搜查北革府兰鲁卡县一个仓库，逮捕两名嫌疑人，查获干燥壁虎尸体和受保护木材，可能与国际走私网络有关。

title: Bangkok man kills ex-wife after she refuses to have sex with him
title_cn: 曼谷男子因前妻拒绝发生性关系将其刺死
desc_original: Bangkok man kills ex-wife after she refuses to have sex with him Legacy A Thai man fatally stabbed his ex-wife at a rented room in Bangkok yesterday, March 8, after she refused to have sex with him. The suspect, 58 year old Samorn, contacted a friend, who is a police officer, to confess that he murdered his ex-wife, 49 year old Wanatda. Samorn also told the officer he planned to commit suicide , prompting police to send additional support to the location, a room in Phasi Charoen district. Armed officers from Bang Khun Thian Police Station went to a rented room in Soi Thoet Thai 82, Phasi Charo
summary_cn: 曼谷一名58岁男子因前妻拒绝与其发生性关系，在出租屋内将其刺死。嫌疑人随后联系担任警察的朋友自首，并表示计划自杀。

title: Pattaya Gears Up For Explosive Start to Music Festival 2026 with Free Beach Concerts This Weekend
title_cn: 芭提雅音乐节周末热辣开场
desc_original: Pattaya, Thailand – Music lovers and beachgoers in for an electrifying treat as the Pattaya Music Festival 2026 kicks off its first weekend on March 6-7 at the Central Pattaya Beach stage.
summary_cn: 芭提雅——2026芭提雅音乐节于3月6-7日在芭提雅海滩舞台拉开首周序幕，音乐爱好者和海滩游客迎来精彩演出。

desc_original: SET-listed developer SC Asset Corporation will continue shifting towards non-residential business, aiming to increase its contribution to net profit to 30% by 2030 from 20% last year.
summary_cn: 泰国上市开发商 SC Asset 宣布将继续向非住宅业务转型。其目标是将该业务对净利润的贡献从去年的20%提高到2030年的30%。这反映了泰国顶级开发商在波动的房地产市场中寻求多元化收入和抗风险能力的趋势，反映出纯住宅开发市场的增长放缓压力。
title_cn: SC Asset 转型非住宅业务：力争2030年利润占比达30% (SC Asset persists with shift to non-residential business)

desc_original: Tak — Gas stations in several border districts of Tak province have begun restricting fuel sales, banning vehicles from Myanmar while limiting Thai-registered cars to purchases of no more than 1,000 baht due to surge of vehicles crossing from Myawaddy.
summary_cn: 因中东局势导致能源供应担忧，大量车辆从缅甸妙瓦底涌入泰国达府（Tak）加油。目前达府五个边境地区的加油站已开始限制燃油销售：禁止缅甸牌照车辆加油，泰国牌照车辆每车限购1000泰铢。这一现象也反映出泰国燃油价格补贴在邻国对比下的价格优势及供应紧张态势。
title_cn: 达府加油站限制销售：禁缅甸车加油，泰国车限1000铢 (Border gas stations in Tak ban Myanmar vehicles, limit Thai cars to 1,000 baht)

desc_original: The first group of Thai nationals evacuating Iran amidst conflict arrived at Suvarnabhumi airport on Monday evening.
summary_cn: 受美伊冲突影响，第一批从伊朗撤离的泰国公民已于周一晚抵达曼谷苏万那普机场。政府协调了经由土耳其的撤离路线。泰国监管机构也简化了撤离航班的审批流程，优先处理人道主义救援。这标志着中东局势对泰国的直接影响已进入领事保护阶段。
title_cn: 首批从伊朗撤离的泰国公民抵达曼谷 (Thai evacuees from Iran arrive in Thailand)

title: Surgery case under scrutiny after conflicting accounts over post-op condition
title_cn: 泰国整形手术案例引争议：术后情况说法不一
desc_original: Surgery case under scrutiny after conflicting accounts over post-op condition Legacy A Thai plastic surgeon defended himself after the patient's family complained that a man remained unconscious for four days and his condition worsened following nose and chin surgery on March 4. The complainant, 34 year old Jiraphat, contacted the non-profit organisation Saimai Survive, saying his older brother, 37 year old Ittiphat, is still in critical condition after undergoing surgery at a clinic. Jiraphat said he paid 480,000 baht for the operation. Jiraphat said his brother trusted the clinic because a w
summary_cn: 一名泰国整形外科医生为手术后果进行辩护，此前患者家人投诉称一男子在鼻部和下巴整形手术后昏迷四天且情况恶化。患者家人支付48万铢手术费。

title: Thai teen earns bachelor's degree with honours at 16
title_cn: 泰国16岁少年以荣誉学位获学士学位
desc_original: BANGKOK — A Thai teenager has drawn attention after graduating with a bachelor's degree with second-class honours at the age of 16 while also building an impressive career in figure skating. Srisupha Kesavapitak, known as 'Beijing', enrolled at Ramkhamhaeng University in 2020 at the age of 13 after passing the IGCSE equivalency exam. She studied in two faculties simultaneously: English in the Faculty of Humanities and Optometry. After three years of study, she completed her first bachelor's degree in English with second-class honours from the Faculty of Humanities. Beijing said the honours deg
summary_cn: 一名泰国青少年在16岁时以二等荣誉学位毕业，同时花滑成绩斐然。Srisupha Kesavapitak 2020年13岁时通过IGCSE考试进入兰甘亨大学。

title: Pattaya bar worker reports foreign man steals mobile from cashier counter
title_cn: 芭提雅酒吧员工报告：外籍男子偷走收银台手机
desc_original: Pattaya bar worker reports foreign man steals mobile from cashier counter Legacy A foreign man was seen in a CCTV footage, stealing a mobile phone of a Thai worker at a bar in Pattaya at about 8pm yesterday, March 8. The victim feared that the images and personal information on the phone would be leaked and misused. The worker of Utopia bar in Soi Pattaya 6 filed a complaint with Mueang Pattaya Police Station and provided CCTV footage as evidence. The suspect's nationality has not been confirmed. In the video, the suspect was seen wearing a black jacket, black cap, beige shorts and white train
summary_cn: 芭提雅一家酒吧的员工报告称，昨晚8点左右，一名外籍男子在收银台偷走一名泰国员工的手机。受害者担心手机中的图像和个人信息被泄露滥用。

title: British man attacks Thai police in convenience store before being restrained
title_cn: 英国男子在便利店攻击泰国警察后被制服
desc_original: British man attacks Thai police in convenience store before being restrained Legacy A video circulating online showed a British man attacked a Thai police officer inside a convenience store, before the officer and store staff restrained him. The footage was posted by an X user, @JamesPGoddard90 , yesterday, March 8, with the caption, 'British tourist attacks a Thai police officer in 7-Eleven and instantly regrets it. It's behaviour like this that gives all Brits abroad a bad name.' In the video, the foreign man, reported to be a British national, forced the officer to the floor and punched him
summary_cn: 网上视频显示一名英国男子在便利店内攻击一名泰国警察，随后被警察和店员制服。视频显示该外籍男子将警察推倒并拳击。

title: Power bank suspected after fire rips through home in Buri Ram
title_cn: 疑因充电宝爆炸，武里南府民宅起火
desc_original: Power bank suspected after fire rips through home in Buri Ram Legacy Fire tore through a two-storey home in Hin Khon subdistrict, Lam Plai Mat district, Buri Ram, yesterday, March 8, before firefighters could bring the blaze under control, with the suspected cause later linked to a power bank explosion . Fire engines from the local area were dispatched after the report of a house fire in the subdistrict. By the time firefighters arrived, the blaze had already spread through the half-concrete, half-wooden home. Fire crews used multiple engines to douse the flames, but operations were hampered b
summary_cn: 武里南府 Hin Khon 村一栋两层住宅发生火灾，消防部门怀疑是充电宝爆炸所致。消防车赶到前火势已蔓延。

title: Art in Paradise Pattaya 2026 – Ticket Price, Timings & Photos
title_cn: Art in Paradise Pattaya 2026 - 门票价格和营业时间
desc_original: Explore Art in Paradise Pattaya, Thailand's famous 3D art museum. Check latest ticket prices, opening hours, photos, location.
summary_cn: 探索泰国著名的3D艺术博物馆芭提雅艺术天堂。查看最新门票价格、营业时间、照片和位置。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title: Art exhibitions in Bangkok this March
title_cn: 曼谷3月艺术展览
desc_original: This edition frames culture as an archive you carry in your body. It lives in music, photographs, half-remembered conversations and objects kept for reasons you cannot quite explain.
summary_cn: 本期将文化视为随身携带的档案。它存在于音乐、照片、 半遗忘的对话和出于无法解释的原因保存的物品中。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

desc_original: Five walkable cities in Thailand recommended for expats where people can walk to markets, healthcare, and parks without needing a car: Bangkok, Chiang Mai, Chiang Rai, and others.
summary_cn: 媒体盘点了泰国五个适合步行生活的城市（包括曼谷、清迈、清莱等），适合希望摆脱堵车困扰的外籍人士和养老人员。文章强调了医疗设施、公园和生活配套的便利性。对于追求生活品质、规避交通压力的人群，这些区域是移居的重要参考。
title_cn: 泰国5个适合步行的宜居城市推荐 (Looking for walkable cities in Thailand to move to? Here's 5)

desc_original: Pattaya Music Festival 2026 officially opened on March 6 at the Central Pattaya Beach stage, bringing music and tourism promotion throughout March.
summary_cn: 2026年芭提雅音乐节已于3月6日在芭提雅海滩正式开幕。整个3月期间，海滩将举办多场免费音乐会，旨在吸引游客并促进当地旅游消费。如果是周末前往芭提雅，需注意交通封路和人潮拥挤情况。
title_cn: 2026芭提雅音乐节开幕：3月狂欢持续全月 (Crowds turn out as Pattaya Beach Music Festival kicks off)

desc_original: Thailand could lose more than 40 billion baht in tourism revenue in the worst-case scenario, assuming the Middle East airspace closure lasts for eight weeks, says the Tourism and Sports Ministry.

title_cn: ⚠️ 泰国外交部（Foreign Ministry）紧急警告：提醒仍在中东地区的泰国公民尽快撤离'高风险区域'

泰国各界绷紧神经：中东局势全面评估——能源、出口、旅游、供应链多维承压
desc_original: Thailand's fragile economic recovery faces fresh challenges after war erupted between a US-Israel alliance and Iran.
summary_cn: 美以联军对伊朗发动战争，令泰国本已脆弱的经济复苏雪上加霜。冲突引发的能源价格波动、供应链中断和地区旅游信心下滑，正从多个维度向泰国施压。能源进口依赖、出口竞争力及旅游业收入均面临不确定性风险，各界正密切评估霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）局势对泰国经济的多重冲击。

title_cn: 曼谷One Bangkok公园开幕「Amazing Thailand Galaxy of Love 2026」沉浸式艺术音乐节
desc_original: ... Nat Kruthasoot, Deputy Governor for Tourism Products and Business at the Tourism Authority of Thailand, opens the “Amazing Thailand Galaxy of Love 2026” festival at One Bangkok Park in Bangkok, showcasing immersive domes, music performances, ...
summary_cn: 泰国旅游局（Tourism Authority of Thailand）副局长纳特·庆他萨（Nat Kruthasoot）主持开幕典礼，在曼谷One Bangkok公园正式揭幕「Amazing Thailand Galaxy of Love 2026」节庆活动。活动以沉浸式穹顶装置与现场音乐表演为核心体验，旨在提升入境旅游吸引力，展示泰国文化与创意产业的软实力。

title_cn: 曼谷近郊孟族（Mon）风情宋干节（Songkran）：帕塔当（Phra Pradaeng）4月24-26日举办，别具一格
泰叻日报年度嘉年华（Thairath Fair）3月12-15日在曼谷The Mall Bangkae商场开幕
desc_original: Mark your calendars for three major fun-filled events in 2026: March at The Mall Live Store Bangkae (12-15 Mar), June at Future Park Rangsit (25-28 Jun), and October at Fashion Island Ramintra (1-4 Oct).
summary_cn: 泰叻日报（Thairath）年度嘉年华2026年将分三站举行：3月12至15日在曼谷The Mall Live Store Bangkae商场开幕，6月25至28日移师Future Park Rangsit，10月1至4日在Fashion Island Ramintra收官。活动涵盖娱乐、展览等多类型项目，是泰国媒体举办的年度大型公众活动。

title_cn: 曼谷设计周（Bangkok Design Week）2026确立亚洲创意枢纽地位，全球媒体聚焦
曼谷恐怖电影节（Bangkok Horror Film Festival）2026：废弃商场中的骇人体验，入场须知全攻略
S2O Thailand 2026全阵容公布：360度水舞EDM音乐节，打造沉浸式游乐公园体验
desc_original: “The festival’s ‘Party in ... · In 2026, S2O Thailand will once again pair its music line-up with 360-degree water features, transforming the festival site into “an immersive amusement park”....
summary_cn: S2O Thailand 2026音乐节正式公布演出阵容，活动延续以360度水舞装置配合电子音乐（EDM）表演的特色，将场地打造成沉浸式游乐公园体验。该节庆以泼水为核心互动元素，吸引国内外乐迷参与，是泰国年度重要的大型音乐娱乐活动之一。

title_cn: 战火冲击波：中东局势下泰国能源与供应链的多重压力与应对
desc_original: The escalating conflict in the Middle East, particularly the looming threat of a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, is casting a long shadow over the economy.
summary_cn: 中东冲突持续升级，霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）被封锁的威胁日益逼近，泰国经济面临严峻考验。作为石油进口依赖型经济体，泰国在能源供应安全、原材料成本上涨和供应链稳定等多个层面承受压力，政府和企业正积极研究应对替代方案，全面评估冲击规模。

title_cn: 🔄 泰国启动从伊朗撤离行动，首批公民已开始离境（3月8日更新）
desc_original: Thailand has begun evacuating its first group of nationals from Iran, relocating diplomatic operations to eastern Turkey to support the repatriation effort.

title_cn: 大选后续：最高行政法院仍在审查18起选举及公投相关案件
desc_original: The Supreme Administrative Court is reviewing 18 cases related to the recent election and referendum, with one case already dismissed, two rejected, and one withdrawn, says Prawit Boonthiem, vice president of the court.
summary_cn: 最高行政法院（Supreme Administrative Court）副院长巴威·汶提姆（Prawit Boonthiem）表示，法院目前仍在审查与近期大选及公投相关的18起案件，其中1起已被撤销、2起被驳回、1起由申请方主动撤回，其余案件仍在程序推进中，选后法律争议清理工作持续进行。

title_cn: 中东紧张局势推高泰国化肥价格，孔敬（Khon Kaen）调查显示尿素（Urea）零售价大幅上涨
desc_original: A survey in Khon Kaen on Friday has found the retail price of urea fertiliser to have increased by about 50 baht per sack as stocks at several distributors become depleted ahead of planting season.
summary_cn: 对孔敬府（Khon Kaen）的调查显示，受中东紧张局势影响，尿素（Urea）化肥零售价格每袋上涨约50铢，多家经销商库存已告紧张。此次涨价恰逢农业播种季前，对农民成本造成直接压力，当地农业部门正密切关注供应动态，评估后续影响。

title_cn: 芭提雅市长巡视流浪狗收容所，计划建设30莱（Rai）新设施应对收容量增长
2026芭提雅音乐节（Pattaya Music Festival）首周末正式开幕，多部门联动保障安保
泰国是否计划'向游客发钱'？旅游补贴方案传言引发社交媒体热议与官方澄清
summary_cn: 2026年初，社交媒体流传「泰国将每天向外国游客发放2000铢」的消息，引发广泛讨论。泰国官方随即澄清，此说法纯属谣言，政府从未制定或讨论过此类政策。当局呼吁公众通过官方渠道核实旅游相关信息，避免被误导性内容混淆，以免损害泰国旅游业形象。

title_cn: 芭提雅将学生及教师安全列为首要任务，市政当局对校车（School Bus）车队开展安全检查
俄罗斯男子在芭提雅Jomtien区因涉嫌非法大麻（Cannabis）加工被捕
开战六天后：泰国为何应拒绝美国主导的'丛林法则'外交逻辑（考索英文评论）
summary_cn: 本文为评论文章，写作于美以联合打击伊朗后第6天。文章指出伊朗已反击多个海湾国家美军目标及以色列，冲突造成超千名平民死亡，据报包括168名女学生罹难。作者以霍尔木兹封锁第6天为切入点，呼吁泰国在「丛林法则」主导的新国际秩序中保持独立外交立场，拒绝随美国立场起舞。

title_cn: 北柳府（Chachoengsao）Ban Pho区稀释剂（Thinner）化工厂发生大火并伴随爆炸
summary_cn: 2026年3月6日下午4时，差春骚府（Chachoengsao）班珀区（Ban Pho）Cargo Chemical公司（生产稀释剂和易燃化学品）发生重大火灾，浓烟冲天、多次连环爆炸。事发初期有工人被困，消防队紧急出动扑救，周边居民被疏散，火势得到初步控制，暂无死亡报告，事故原因正在调查中。

title_cn: 泰国移民局（Immigration）反驳柬埔寨媒体关于游客在泰遭受不当对待的报道
summary_cn: 泰国移民局官员博讪（Pol. Col. Phongthorn Phongratchatanan）驳斥柬埔寨媒体报道，称其所谓柬埔寨和印度游客在泰国机场遭不公平拒绝入境并被索取额外费用的说法「完全失实」。他表示相关报道属片面描述，可能损害泰国旅游形象，已要求相关方通过官方渠道核实事实。

title_cn: 两名泰国女性在台湾因走私海洛因（Heroin）被判处监禁
desc_original: 2 Thai women jailed in Taiwan for heroin smuggling Legacy A Taiwanese court sentenced two Thai women to prison for smuggling heroin into Taiwan in September last year by swallowing drug packages and concealing them in their genital area. The two women were arrested on September 7 at an airport in Kaohsiung in southern Taiwan after Taiwanese officials said they had received a tip-off about a heroin smuggling operation in August and tightened passenger screening measures at the airport. Officials
summary_cn: 台湾法院判决两名泰国女性因走私海洛因（Heroin）入狱，二人于去年9月通过吞咽毒品包装袋并藏匿于身体隐私部位的方式将毒品带入台湾。两人于9月7日在高雄机场落网，台湾当局此前接到线报后已提前加强相关航班旅客安检力度。

title_cn: 泰中投资论坛吸引逾800名投资者参与，泰国投资促进委员会（BOI）联合中国大使馆主办

desc_original: 5 things to do in Bangkok this weekend (March 7 to 8) Legacy As always, Bangkok gives you plenty of ways to fill your weekend, whether you want to browse, socialise, plan a trip, or catch something more lively. From festivals and fairs to Muay Thai and a playful singles night, here are five things to do in Bangkok this weekend. On this page Event Date Location Highlight Beer People Festival 2026 at ChangChui Creative Park March 6 to 8 ChangChui Creative Park A bigger version of the former beer f
summary_cn: 2026年3月7至8日曼谷周末五大推荐活动：ChangChui Creative Park啤酒节（3月6至8日）、昭披耶滨水庆典、泰拳赛事观赛体验、曼谷旅游展览，以及面向单身人士的联谊活动。活动覆盖娱乐、美食和体育多个类型，适合不同偏好的市民和游客。

title_cn: 曼谷都市电力局（MEA）叫停内部通讯系统，起因遥控摩托车（Remote Key Motorbike）大规模异常失控
summary_cn: 曼谷都市电力局（Metropolitan Electricity Authority，MEA）于3月5日宣布，因王通郎（Wang Thonglang）区域大量摩托车遥控启动系统集体失灵，疑似遭无线信号干扰，MEA已临时关闭其网络通讯系统以配合排查。干扰范围包括英他拉蓬路（Intharaphon Road）等多条街道，当局正协同调查干扰源头。

title_cn: 甲米（Krabi）蔻兰塔岛（Koh Lanta）两名外国男子逃单加油费后失联，车主报警追查
desc_original: Foreigners sought after dodging fuel bill in Koh Lanta, Krabi Legacy A fuel dispenser owner on Koh Lanta in Krabi is seeking two foreign men who refuelled a motorcycle and left without paying yesterday, March 5. The owner, Sirilak Kasikun, posted CCTV footage of the incident in the Koh Lanta Jobs Facebook group and asked members to help identify the two men. She said the pair served themselves at the dispenser before riding away without making payment. Sirilak later told ThaiRath that the two fo
summary_cn: 甲米府蔻兰塔岛（Koh Lanta）一名加油站站主希里拉克（Sirilak Kasikun）报告，两名外国男子于3月5日为摩托车加油后拒绝付款扬长而去。她在Facebook群组发布监控录像协助辨认，并向警方报案。摩托车随后被发现遗弃于附近路边，警方正介入调查两名男子身份。

title_cn: 曼谷唐人街（Chinatown）奇事：女子约会App相遇对象却被派去完成Line Man外卖配送任务

According to a post shared by Facebook page อีซ้อขยี้ข่าว :อีซ้อ yesterday, March 5, the woman met the man on a Facebook dating app and chatted with him for a while. title_cn: ⚠️ 安努廷紧急令：泰国全面禁止出口成品油和液化气，防范中东危机引发国内短缺
desc_original: BANGKOK — Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has ordered a temporary ban on the export of several types of fuel and liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) to prevent potential shortages in Thailand, citing escalating tensions in the Middle East. The order, published in the Royal Thai Government Gazette on 6 March 2026, takes effect immediately under Prime Ministerial Order No. 2/2026. The measure suspends exports of refined fuels including gasoline, gasohol, high-speed diesel and Jet A1 aviation fuel, as

title_cn: 🔄 泰国石油储备提升至95天供应量：能源部加急采购，应对中东危机
desc_original: Thailand boosts oil reserves to last 95 days amid Middle East tensions Legacy Thailand’s oil reserves have risen to a 95-day supply, up from 60 days, following additional procurement efforts by domestic traders, the Ministry of Energy confirmed on Thursday, March 6. Oil traders have been directed to expedite deliveries to regions experiencing shortages, while a directive from the prime minister requires traders to gradually raise the legal reserve proportion from 1% to 3% to ensure long-te

title_cn: 🔄 中东战争能源风险警告：泰国资本市场高管称冲突或持续逾一个月、供应缺口难免
desc_original: The war in the Middle East could become a prolonged geopolitical risk, with attacks already spreading across the region and likely to persist for more than a month, potentially causing an energy supply shortage, warn capital market executives.
summary_cn: 泰国资本市场高管发出警告：中东战争已演变为持续性地缘政治风险，袭击已蔓延至多个区域，冲突预计将持续超过一个月，届时将不可避免地造成能源供应缺口。对石油进口依赖度较高的泰国而言，这一风险对经济和金融市场构成重大威胁，投资者需警惕能源价格剧烈波动。

title_cn: 🔄 撤侨行动启动：首批69名在伊泰国公民3月7日经陆路赴土耳其、再乘机回国
desc_original: Thai nationals in Iran to begin return journey amid Middle East tensions Legacy Thailand’s government has confirmed that 125 Thai nationals in Iran have requested repatriation, with the first group of 69 set to depart on March 7 by land to Van, Turkey, before flying home. The update came following a meeting of the Centre for Administration and Monitoring of Situations in the Middle East (CAMSME), with details shared at a briefing at 6.25pm on March 6 at Government House. Panidom Pachimsawa
summary_cn: 泰国政府确认，目前在伊朗共有125名泰国公民申请回国撤侨。首批69人将于3月7日从伊朗出发，经陆路前往土耳其范城（Van），再转乘飞机返回泰国。相关协调工作由中东局势管理与监测中心（CAMSME）负责，撤侨行动于3月6日晚政府大厅新闻发布会后正式启动。

title_cn: 修宪使命遭遇政治现实：人民党主导改革愿景能否驾驭新国会博弈？
desc_original: The post-election political landscape has entered a delicate new phase after voters endorsed the first step towards constitutional change in a referendum held alongside the Feb 8 general election — a victory claimed by the People’s Party.
summary_cn: 2月8日大选同步举行的公投中，选民支持启动修宪进程，人民党（People's Party）将此视为改革授权的重要信号。然而选后政治格局错综复杂，人民党主导的修宪议程在新国会内面临多党博弈，如何在保守势力与各方盟友之间寻求共识，将是决定修宪进程能否推进的关键变量。

title_cn: 专家警告：泰国面临经济、地缘和气候三重危机，必须火速完成新政府组建
desc_original: Experts have called for the urgent formation of a new government as Thailand faces mounting economic, geopolitical and climate challenges, warning delays could worsen policy responses and weaken public confidence.

title_cn: 泰国银行坏账出售量2025年骤降36%：银行收紧新增不良贷款管理，静待央行纾困政策
desc_original: The sale of non-performing loans (NPLs) by the banking industry declined by more than 30% last year as banks tightened their management of new bad loans and awaited support measures from the Bank of Thailand.
summary_cn: 2025年泰国银行业不良贷款（Non-Performing Loans，NPLs）出售规模大幅下降逾30%。银行普遍加强对新增坏账的内部管理，并等待泰国央行（Bank of Thailand）出台相关纾困政策支持。此举反映银行业对外部不确定性的审慎态度，亦显示金融系统正积极消化历史坏账存量。

title_cn: ⚠️ 普吉13万外籍劳工工作证积压严重：副省长紧急介入，雇主苦苦等待

desc_original: BANGKOK — 5 March 2026, Thailand’s Board of Investment (BOI), in cooperation with the Chinese Embassy in Thailand and public and private sector partners, hosted the “Thailand-China Investment Forum: Keys to Success & Sustainable Growth for Chinese Enterprises” at the Siam Kempinski Hotel in Bangkok. title_cn: DSI揭发10亿铢级网络赌博黑幕：资金流与国会议员挂钩，暂未发出逮捕令
desc_original: DSI uncovers billion-baht online gambling network linked to politician Legacy The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) has stated it has not issued an arrest warrant for Chonnapat Nakasu, even as investigators uncovered significant evidence linking him to a network of ten online gambling websites with funds circulating in the billions of baht. title_cn: 🔄 卡塔姆党MP遭DSI传讯：被控网络赌博洗钱，音频与聊天证据直指其与犯罪网络关联
desc_original: The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) has summoned Klatham Party MP Chonnaphat Naksua to acknowledge charges linked to an online gambling and money-laundering network, following raids that uncovered audio and chat evidence reportedly tying him to the network.

title_cn: 名校入学考试「钱扔垃圾桶」风波：严苛禁带规定令考生身无分文、无钱回家
desc_original: A controversy has erupted over the strict rules set for those taking the exam for admission to Matthayom Suksa 4 (Grade 10) at a prestigious Bangkok school after some students had to discard cash in trash bins, raising concerns that some might have no money to travel home.
summary_cn: 曼谷一所知名学校高一（Matthayom Suksa 4）入学考试规定引发争议：考场严禁携带现金，部分考生被迫将身上的钱丢入垃圾桶，事后因无钱乘车而陷入困境。事件引发家长和公众对考试管理规定合理性的广泛质疑，相关批评在社交媒体迅速发酵。

title_cn: 战争阴云压制泰国营销预算：泰国营销协会（MAT）预警全年广告支出将继续收缩
desc_original: Marketing spending is likely to decline further as geopolitical conflicts influence consumer sentiment, according to the Marketing Association of Thailand (MAT).
summary_cn: 泰国营销协会（Marketing Association of Thailand，MAT）发出预警，受中东地缘政治冲突影响，消费者信心持续下滑，预计全年营销和广告支出将进一步收缩。企业正重新评估预算分配，削减品牌推广投入，中东局势的持续恶化是主要压制因素之一，广告市场面临结构性压力。

desc_original: Pattaya City officials, police, and Banglamung district officers line up during the deployment briefing ahead of the opening night of Pattaya Music Festival 2026 at Pattaya Beach. PATTAYA, Thailand – Authorities have deployed teams of municipal officers, police, and local administrators to ensure safety and smooth operations as the first weekend of the Pattaya Music Festival 2026 gets underway along Pattaya Beach. desc_original: Online discussions in early 2026 sparked debate after claims circulated on social media suggesting Thailand might give foreign tourists 2,000 baht per day, raising questions about possible incentives to boost tourism. summary_cn: 2026年初，社交媒体流传「泰国将每天向外国游客发放2000铢」的消息，引发广泛讨论。泰国官方随即澄清，此说法纯属谣言，政府从未制定或讨论过此类政策。当局呼吁公众通过官方渠道核实旅游相关信息，避免被误导性内容混淆，以免损害泰国旅游业形象。

title_cn: ⚠️ 泰国气象局预警：夏季风暴来袭，曼谷在内41府将遭雷暴和强阵风
desc_original: Thailand braces for summer storm with thunderstorms and strong winds Legacy Thailand’s Meteorological Department has forecast that upper Thailand will continue to experience thunderstorms and strong winds tomorrow, with 41 provinces, including Bangkok, expected to be affected. On March 6, the department released its weather forecast for the next 24 hours, warning that a summer storm will bring thunderstorms, strong winds, and isolated lightning strikes to upper Thailand. The conditions are
summary_cn: 泰国气象局（Meteorological Department）3月6日发布天气预警，预测未来24小时内，包括曼谷在内的41个府将受夏季风暴影响，出现雷暴、强阵风和局部闪电。上泰国（Upper Thailand）地区气候条件不稳定，当局提醒民众注意户外安全，避免在强风雷暴期间从事户外活动。

title_cn: 观点：泰国为何应拒绝跟随美国主导的「丛林法则」——霍尔木兹封锁第6天启示

The civilian death toll has surpassed one thousand, according to both US-based and Iranian sources, including 168 schoolgirls reportedly killed in a still-disputed strike on an elementary school in Minab, s
summary_cn: 本文为评论文章，写作于美以联合打击伊朗后第6天。文章指出伊朗已反击多个海湾国家美军目标及以色列，冲突造成超千名平民死亡，据报包括168名女学生罹难。作者以霍尔木兹封锁第6天为切入点，呼吁泰国在「丛林法则」主导的新国际秩序中保持独立外交立场，拒绝随美国立场起舞。

title_cn: 泰国差春骚化工厂大火引发连环爆炸：浓烟滚滚、工人被困，消防队紧急出动
desc_original: CHACHOENGSAO — A major fire broke out at a thinner and flammable chemical factory in Ban Pho district on 6 March 2026, sending thick black smoke into the sky and triggering repeated explosions, authorities said. The blaze began around 16:00 at Cargo Chemical Co., Ltd., located at 79/1 Moo 4, Thep Ratcha subdistrict, Ban Pho district. Officials said the fire quickly intensified to a severe level, with flames and dense smoke visible from a distance. Witnesses reported hearing multiple loud blasts
summary_cn: 2026年3月6日下午4时，差春骚府（Chachoengsao）班珀区（Ban Pho）Cargo Chemical公司（生产稀释剂和易燃化学品）发生重大火灾，浓烟冲天、多次连环爆炸。事发初期有工人被困，消防队紧急出动扑救，周边居民被疏散，火势得到初步控制，暂无死亡报告，事故原因正在调查中。

title_cn: 泰国移民局反击柬埔寨媒体：拒绝「游客遭不公平拒绝入境并被索费」报道，斥其误导公众
desc_original: BANGKOK — Thai immigration authorities on Thursday rejected reports by Cambodian media claiming Cambodian and Indian tourists were being unfairly denied entry at Thai airports and forced to pay additional fees. Pol. Col. Phongthorn Phongratchatanan, deputy commander of Immigration Division 2 and its spokesperson, said the reports were “completely inaccurate” and presented only one side of the story, which could mislead the public and harm Thailand’s tourism image. The Cambodian report alleged th
summary_cn: 泰国移民局官员博讪（Pol. Col. Phongthorn Phongratchatanan）驳斥柬埔寨媒体报道，称其所谓柬埔寨和印度游客在泰国机场遭不公平拒绝入境并被索取额外费用的说法「完全失实」。他表示相关报道属片面描述，可能损害泰国旅游形象，已要求相关方通过官方渠道核实事实。

title_cn: 巴西毒品外卖商在帕岸岛落网：WhatsApp菜单接单、现场查获多种毒品逾10万铢现金
desc_original: Brazilian drug delivery suspect arrested on Koh Pha Ngan Legacy Yesterday, March 5, immigration police in Surat Thani arrested a Brazilian man accused of running a drug delivery service on Koh Pha Ngan. A controlled buy led to the seizure of multiple drugs and more than 106,000 baht in cash. The arrest was made after investigators received information that a foreign suspect, later identified as Brazilian national Pedro, was allegedly acting as a major dealer among tourists on the island. Police
summary_cn: 3月5日，苏叻他尼府（Surat Thani）移民警察在帕岸岛（Koh Pha Ngan）逮捕一名巴西籍男子，绰号Pedro，其被指通过WhatsApp向岛上游客提供毒品外卖服务，接受订单后上门配送。警方通过卧底购毒行动完成抓捕，当场缴获多种毒品及逾10.6万铢现金，确认其系岛上重要毒品中间商。

title_cn: 芭提雅Jomtien非法大麻加工窝点被捣破：俄罗斯人落网，移民警察搜查住宅起获大批原料
desc_original: Immigration Police officers from Chonburi Province inspect a house in the Jomtien area of Pattaya after uncovering an alleged illegal cannabis processing operation run by a 27-year-old Russian national. PATTAYA, Thailand – Immigration police in Chonburi Province have arrested a Russian national accused of operating an illegal cannabis production and processing site in the Jomtien area of Pattaya. The operation was led by Pol. Col. Decho Sosuwannakul, deputy commander of Immigration Division 3, t

title_cn: 曼谷警方追获芭提雅泳池别墅抢劫案跨性别嫌疑人：受害者为韩国游客，案发于2月24日
desc_original: Transwoman nabbed in Bangkok over South Korean tourist robbery Legacy Following an earlier report on the pool villa incident involving a transgender suspect and a South Korean tourist in Chon Buri, police tracked down and arrested the 20 year old in Bangkok yesterday, March 5. The case dates back to about 3am on February 24, when 46 year old South Korean national Kim Sangyul, and two male friends invited three transgender women they met along the Pattaya beach area to continue drinking at a pool
summary_cn: 警方于3月5日在曼谷逮捕一名20岁跨性别女性嫌疑人，涉嫌参与2月24日凌晨发生在芭提雅泳池别墅的抢劫案。受害人为46岁韩国游客金相烈（Kim Sangyul）及其朋友，三人邀请在芭提雅海滩结识的三名跨性别女性继续饮酒，随后遭抢劫，嫌疑人此后潜逃至曼谷，现已归案候审。

title_cn: 曼谷王通郎摩托车遥控钥匙集体失灵：MEA关闭网络通讯系统排查信号干扰原因
desc_original: MEA suspends communications system after remote key motorbike failures Legacy The Metropolitan Electricity Authority (MEA) issued a statement yesterday, March 5, saying it had temporarily shut down its network communications system after reports that remote key motorbikes in Wang Thonglang, Bangkok, were failing to start due to suspected signal interference . On its official Facebook account , the MEA said that it had been made aware that residents in Intharaphon Road, Soi Intharaphon 10, Phlapp
summary_cn: 曼谷都市电力局（Metropolitan Electricity Authority，MEA）于3月5日宣布，因王通郎（Wang Thonglang）区域大量摩托车遥控启动系统集体失灵，疑似遭无线信号干扰，MEA已临时关闭其网络通讯系统以配合排查。干扰范围包括英他拉蓬路（Intharaphon Road）等多条街道，当局正协同调查干扰源头。

title_cn: 曼谷成全球旅游战略枢纽：Skift论坛聚焦亚洲旅行业下一阶段变革，曼谷居前沿
desc_original: Asia is where travel strategy is being tested in real time. Bangkok offers a front-row seat to the decisions shaping the industry’s next phase.
summary_cn: 国际旅游媒体Skift在曼谷举办专业论坛，聚焦亚洲旅游业下一阶段的战略变革。曼谷被定位为全球旅游策略的前沿实验场，成为观察亚洲旅行趋势、数字化转型和旅游体验创新的核心窗口。各行业领袖就市场定位、技术应用及可持续旅游等议题在曼谷展开深度对话。

title_cn: 泰国网球大师赛2026球队球衣亮相：4月13-20日曼谷/芭提雅/普吉/华欣四城联办
desc_original: The Thailand Tennis Masters 2026 officially unveiled its tournament jerseys in Bangkok. Scheduled for April 13-20, 2026, the event aims to boost sports tourism by featuring international players and highlighting cities like Bangkok, Pattaya, ...
summary_cn: 泰国网球大师赛（Thailand Tennis Masters）2026年正式公布球队球衣设计，赛事将于4月13至20日举行，跨越曼谷、芭提雅、普吉和华欣（Hua Hin）四座城市联合举办。组委会期望通过引进国际球员吸引体育旅游人群，同时展示泰国多元城市魅力，推动体育赛事与旅游业深度融合。

title_cn: ⚠️ 泰国"Made in Thailand"假出口遭美方新一轮严查，去年出口激增引发关税洗产地疑虑
desc_original: Thailand faces closer scrutiny over products falsely claiming "Made in Thailand" status that are exported to the US, following a surge in Thai exports to the American market over the past year.

title_cn: 🔄 政府出台紧急措施防范国内燃料短缺：增加石油储备、暂停大部分出口，保证能源安全
desc_original: The government has introduced a series of emergency measures to prevent domestic fuel shortages, including increasing oil reserves and suspending most exports, while assuring the public that national energy supplies remain secure.
summary_cn: 面对中东局势引发的能源供应不确定性，泰国政府紧急出台系列措施：增加国内石油战略储备、暂停大部分燃料出口，以优先保障国内需求。政府同时向公众保证，泰国能源整体供应安全，呼吁民众理性应对，避免恐慌性囤油加剧人为短缺，确保全国能源市场稳定运行。

title_cn: 🔄 中东战争最坏情景：泰国旅游量或跌25%，官方紧急切换策略抢夺短途亚洲客源
desc_original: War in the Middle East could seriously affect Thai tourism this year, with a 25% decline from the 2026 target being the worst-case scenario if the fighting extends beyond three months, prompting officials to target short‑haul tourists to fill the gap.

title_cn: 🔄 安努廷下令全力寻源：霍尔木兹海峡关闭已切断泰国约半数常规石油供应，紧急寻找替代渠道
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has ordered a stepped-up effort to secure more oil and gas after the closure of the Strait of Hormuz cut off access to about half of Thailand’s regular supply.
summary_cn: 总理安努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）下令紧急加大力度寻找替代石油和天然气来源，原因是霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）封锁导致泰国约半数常规石油供应中断。政府正积极与非中东产油国接触，评估替代供应方案，以应对潜在的能源短缺危机，保障国内市场供应稳定。

title_cn: ⚠️ 素攀鲁移民拘留中心（Suan Phlu）涉腐举报：中国籍被拘者被迫缴月贿20万铢，证据已提交警察总署
desc_original: BANGKOK — 5 March 2026, On Thursday at the Royal Thai Police headquarters, Mr. Atchariya Ruangrattanapong, president of the Crime Victims Assistance Club, submitted evidence to Pol. Gen. Kittirat Phanphet, the national police chief, requesting an investigation into alleged misconduct by officers under the Immigration Bureau assigned to the detention facility at Suan Phlu Immigration Office. He said he had received information that Chinese detainees were being required to pay monthly bribes. The

title_cn: ⚠️ 曼谷拉玛9号奢华公寓扫荡行动：94名越南籍嫌疑人落网，疑与Huai Khwang诈骗呼叫中心网络有关
desc_original: 94 Vietnamese arrested in Bangkok raid linked to gambling network Legacy Police arrested 94 Vietnamese nationals during a raid on an office in a luxury condominium in Rama 9, Bangkok, yesterday, March 4, after suspicions that the site may have been linked to a call centre scam network . Officers from Makkasan Police Station, Immigration Police and the Cyber Crime Investigation Bureau searched the office, located on the first floor of the condominium in Huai Khwang district. Police said the opera

title_cn: 🔄 选委会（EC）书面回复警方30项讯问：曼谷补选拍摄选票/解码条形码案调查持续推进
desc_original: The Election Commission (EC) has submitted written responses to 30 police questions as part of an investigation into allegations that several individuals photographed ballot papers and attempted to decode ballot barcodes during a recent re-poll in Bangkok.
summary_cn: 选举委员会（Election Commission，EC）已就警方提出的30项书面讯问作出正式回应，配合调查曼谷补选期间有人拍摄选票及试图解码条形码的指控。此案涉及选举程序安全性问题，目前仍在侦查阶段，警方正对相关人员身份及行为动机展开核实，选委会表示将全力配合司法程序。

title_cn: 能源涨价冲击餐饮业：原材料成本全面承压，餐厅业者绷紧神经应对中东能源危机
desc_original: Restaurants are bracing for potential hikes in raw material prices due to rising energy costs, driven by the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.
summary_cn: 中东冲突推高能源价格，泰国餐饮业者正为原材料成本全面上涨做准备。烹饪油、食材运输费用及采购价格均存在上涨压力，部分餐厅正评估是否调整菜单定价或压缩运营支出，以维持可持续经营，业界普遍对中东局势走向保持高度警惕。

title_cn: 全球内存涨价传导Commart：泰国电脑售价上涨10-20%，AI服务器内存组件近乎翻倍
desc_original: The global surge in memory prices has lifted computer costs in Thailand by 10-20%, while artificial intelligence (AI) server costs have climbed significantly, with some key components such as memory nearly doubling in the first quarter.

title_cn: 挪威游客因护照页面破损被普吉岛移民局拘押数日，引发挪威媒体国际关注
desc_original: PHUKET — A 26-year-old Norwegian man was detained at Phuket International Airport after Thai immigration officers allegedly found a torn page in his passport, according to a report first published on 27 February by Norwegian daily Verdens Gang (VG). Marcus Haavik, 26, had arrived in Phuket with a friend for a planned two-week holiday when he was stopped at passport control. The pair had intended to spend a week in Phuket, travel to the Phi Phi islands and conclude their trip in Bangkok. Haavik t
summary_cn: 26岁挪威男子马库斯·哈维克（Marcus Haavik）抵达普吉国际机场度假时，因护照被发现有破损页面而遭泰国移民官员扣押数日。事件由挪威日报《世界之路》（Verdens Gang）率先报道后引发国际关注，外界对泰国出入境审查标准和拘押程序合理性提出质疑，泰方尚未作出正式回应。
